---
title: "UIAO Documentation"
subtitle: "Guides, specifications, and reference for the UIAO governance substrate"
date: 2026-04-28
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**New here?** Start with the [UIAO home page](../index.html) for the problem statement,
architecture overview, and audience guide. This page is the documentation hub — it maps
what is available and where to find it.
:::

## Start here

| Guide | Time | What you will do |
|---|---|---|
| [10-minute quickstart](quickstart.html) | 10 min | Run a full auditor bundle (evidence, POA&M, SSP narrative) against synthetic ScubaGear fixtures — no tenant required |
| [Adapter authoring tutorial](adapter-authoring-tutorial.html) | 30 min | Build a conformance or modernization adapter from scratch using the shipped ScubaGear adapter as a worked example |

## Substrate reference

| Page | What it covers |
|---|---|
| [Substrate Status](substrate-status.html) | Live maturity map of all 37 UIAO_NNN documents, adapter test tiers, CI enforcement stack, and drift taxonomy — the single source of truth for what is real today vs. aspirational |
| [Drift Detection Standard](16_DriftDetectionStandard.html) | Five drift classes (schema, semantic, provenance, authz, identity), four severity tiers (P1-P4), and SLA-enforced remediation |
| [Substrate Roadmap](uiao-substrate-roadmap.html) | Phase-by-phase delivery plan and milestone tracker |
| [OrgTree Readiness](21_OrgTreeReadiness.html) | Identity OrgTree migration readiness assessment framework |

## Site sections

| Section | Entry point | What you will find |
|---|---|---|
| **Findings** | [Findings registry](../findings/index.html) | Security findings templates and tracked finding records |
| **Academy** | [UIAO Academy](../academy/index.html) | Training modules and conceptual walkthroughs for operators, contributors, and assessors |
| **Modernization** | [Modernization canon](../modernization/index.html) | Identity OrgTree, codebook, dynamic groups, delegation model, directory migration, adapter specifications |
| **Customer Documents** | [Document library](../customer-documents/index.html) | Executive briefs, architecture specs, compliance mappings, modernization guides — organized by pillar |
